creator: sasamotikomi@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to John Baldwin from comment #2)
> Your filesystem is probably corrupted from an earlier crash.  Run fsck in
> single user mode.

I already do that but.
That I just update xorg
# pkg upgrade xorg
I got similar panic again.
I again run fsck without journals fsck in single user mode.
Update.
"All" ok, I successfully update.
